title: Caramelized Coconut Delight
description: A sweet and exotic dessert featuring caramelized coconut and a hint of floral flavors.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 9-inch (23cm) round cake pan with coconut oil.
In a medium bowl, whisk together coconut flakes, granulated sugar, and egg whites until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Drizzle caramel sauce over the top of the coconut mixture.
Return to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the caramel is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Cut into wedges and serve. If desired, drizzle with a few drops of floral extract for extra flavor.
